# Jane Doe — Managing Director

Jane founded Test Company after a long career in consulting. She is known for her
decisive leadership and warm personal style.

## My Role

I oversee the strategic direction of the company and maintain key client relationships.

## Facts I Know

- Revenue is $5M annually
- We have 30 employees
- Our repeat client rate is 45%
